arts.ttl: Guéhi and Crystal Palace warned by FA over ‘I love Jesus’ rainbow armband
arts.sum: England defender not charged for adapting armband Religious messaging goes against FA regulations Marc Guéhi and his club, Crystal Palace, have been given a formal reminder of the Football Association’s rules after the defender wore a rainbow armband with ‘I love Jesus’ written on in Saturday’s 1-1 draw with Newcastle. The 24-year-old has spoken in the past about his devout religious beliefs. The appearance on, or incorporation in, any item of clothing, football boots or other equipment, of any religious message is prohibited under Rule A4 of the governing body’s regulations. The FA declined to comment on whether any repeat by Guehi could lead to a charge. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Marc Guehi issued with 'formal reprimand' over Rainbow armband as FA decline charge
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi raised eyebrows by writing 'I love Jesus' on his Rainbow captain's armband, a decision which appeared to breach the FA's rulebook

arts.ttl: Sam Morsy discovers FA stance on punishment over Rainbow armband refusal
arts.sum: Ipswich's Sam Morsy refused to wear a Rainbow armband in the defeat to Nottingham Forest on Saturday, with the midfielder being the only Premier League captain to decline to support Rainbow Laces

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi to be warned by FA over three-word message penned on rainbow armband
arts.sum: The FA forbids political, religious or personal messaging on football kit

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Crystal Palace can unlock transfer with ‘appropriate offer’ – Move to London on cards
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Crystal Palace are in the picture to sign Juventus’s Nicolò Fagioli, according to Tutto Juve. The 23-year-old came up through the ranks of the Serie A side’s youth system but hasn’t managed to cement a place in their starting lineup so far. arts.ttl: Manchester United and Chelsea ‘considering move’ – €80 to €100m asking price rise, Crystal Palace look out of it
arts.sum: Chelsea, Manchester United and Crystal Palace are all showing interest in Benfica’s Tomás Araújo. Crystal Palace tried to sign the defender by tabling a €30m bid in the summer but it was rejected. On November 13th, Correio da Manhã said Oliver Glasner’s side are still chasing him. arts.ttl: England star Marc Guehi could face FA charge after writing message on Rainbow armband
arts.sum: England defender and Crystal Palace captain Marc Guehi wrote a religious message on his Rainbow armband on Saturday, which appears to break Football Association rules

arts.ttl: Adam Wharton: Man City, Arsenal suffer January blow as Crystal Palace 'set out transfer stance'
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal are reportedly among the clubs who have suffered a blow in their pursuit of Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton.

arts.ttl: Guéhi may face charge for 'I love Jesus' armband
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and England centre-back Marc Guehi could face an FA charge after writing "I love Jesus" on his rainbow-coloured captain's armband.

arts.ttl: Why Sam Morsy refused to wear rainbow armband as Ipswich Town release statement
arts.sum: The Egyptian midfielder was the only Premier League captain who chose not to wear the LGBTQ+ during the weekend's fixtures
